name: acquisition writes only to the working overlay and never changes the official rule surface (the PR-gated invariant)
command: ID=P559I02; BASE=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].length'); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sid --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; AFTER=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].length'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$BASE" = "$AFTER" ] && echo acquisition-official-unchanged 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
